'''Veren Gal''' was an ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Archaeologist/Legends|archaeologist]] who spent many years on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] during the era of the [[Jedi Civil War]], researching the tombs in the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]].

His datapad was discovered in the Tomb of [[Ajunta Pall]] on Korriban by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]. It stated that he had found traces of [[Therangen]] in the tomb. He thought that perhaps the ancient Sith on Korriban used it as a power source. Revan used this knowledge to pass the Therangen pillar on the way to the tomb's sarcophagus.
